title: Scripts
wikitext:
[]: Scripts             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Aug 24, 2011 9:15 am Does anyone know where I can get a script from Death? Or has nobody done that yet? The original source I had went down from the site (should of copied/pasted onto a document. Damn).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 24, 2011 1:06 pm Have you tried www.archive.org?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Aug 24, 2011 6:34 pm Just tried it, and I got this: http://wayback.archive.org/web/*/http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Scripts/Deathscript.html (URL BBcode doesn't work for this URL). I think it is to young for the archive to know.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 24, 2011 8:44 pm Are you looking for a script, as in a translation? (If this is for the fandub, I think I sent some Death scripts to Cappy.)

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Aug 24, 2011 8:48 pm Yes, I need the translation for Death. The most accurate that can be found.

[]: D & R. B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Aug 24, 2011 9:28 pm Death & Rebirth . Armageddon's version of Rebirth cached .

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Aug 24, 2011 9:44 pm Thanks! I'm not as fucked as I was a few hours ago!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Aug 24, 2011 11:57 pm Still might be able to see about touching up portions of the script so as to be readable without gagging.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Aug 25, 2011 8:31 am Awesome man.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 25, 2011 2:04 pm So did C.A.P. keep that stuff I sent him all to himself or something? some PM wrote: Far as DEATH is concerned, I'm not aware of any scripts I would particularly recommend. I have a few fansubs, and possibly the Mangle version, sitting around. You might be able to fudge something out of those along with Platinum (lot of the same scenes and all). http://evacommentary.org/omake/transcripts_fansubs_v1.zip http://evacommentary.org/omake/transcripts_manga-ent_v1.zip I've also got the Katsuragi Expedition scene here .

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Aug 25, 2011 2:11 pm It does seem familiar, but I don't remember. Anyways, now that there is multiple choices, I am not sure which one to choose because fansubs tend to be good, but SSD pointed at the platinum subs for the episodes. My brain is hurting.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Aug 25, 2011 5:43 pm Send me whatever segments you want me to doctor.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Aug 25, 2011 6:42 pm Use Alaska's Sub's for Death, pwease.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Aug 26, 2011 3:36 am I meant, like, individual segments. The whole thing might be a bit much.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Aug 26, 2011 6:32 am Oh.. Uh, eh.. yeah, we might need to be on Skype a little more to talk about individual segments.
